TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Haitun_Aisang_Maw, title = Haitun_Aisang_Maw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Haitun_Aisang_Maw} }

S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox television O Haitun'aisangmaw(Holam: śĶ∑ŤĪöśĄõšłäŤ≤ď, ira ko , Ikilis: When dolphin met cat ) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Cung'hwa ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2005 a miheca saka 7 a folad saka 3 a romi'ad 9:30~11:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^
S.PHON: masa…ĺipa:info~ub~b~vo~ux t…ô…ĺ…ôb~visio~un o~u ńßaito~u~un °aisaŇčmaw(ńßo~u…ĺam: *****, ira ko~u , iki…ĺis: wńß…ôn …¨~…ģo~u…ĺpńßin m…ôt ¶at ) ¶…ô ¶aj ti…ĺifi …¨~…ģo~urama i tajwan. misaŇča ° pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u ¶o~u~uŇč °ńßwa ¶i ina to~u ti…ĺifi …¨~…ģo~urama. mipasa…¨~…ģak to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ *:**~**:** …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja. mianiŇčaja a patiŇčso~u Ē
S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox television O Haitun'aisangmaw(Holam: śĶ∑ŤĪöśĄõšłäŤ≤ď, ira ko , Ikilis: When dolphin met cat ) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Cung'hwa ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2005 a miheca saka 7 a folad saka 3 a romi'ad 9:30~11:00 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^
